data.name: Skull Island: Rise of Kong
data.detailed_description:
踏上第三視角動作冒險之旅，為死於終極王牌捕獵者— Gaw —之手的父母復仇。征服一波波原始野獸，打敗仇敵的爪牙，成為骷髏島的合法統治者。隨著在神祕島上穿行，揭開島上的傳說與各種秘密，你會遭遇沼澤、瀑布、叢林和充滿骷髏石（即島上動植物的力量之源）的洞穴。

• 扮演孤兒Kong，陪伴牠從稚氣未脫的少年蛻變為成熟的骷髏島之王。

• 釋放Kong的戰鬥怒火，施出毀滅性的連擊，制服Gaw的兇猛爪牙。伺機釋放狂暴模式，加強對島上巨型地下生物的攻擊效果。

• 釋放Kong令人心驚膽戰的咆哮，讓敵人落荒而逃，並透過獨特的終結技讓敵人命喪黃泉。

• 在探索骷髏島神話的過程中，你會找到各種收藏品、奇異的動植物，解鎖島上的神祕區域，瞭解島上各種生物的過往以及Kongs的豐富歷史。

• 透過特殊活動和各種 BOSS 戰，將Kong提升到新的高度，從而挖掘其全部戰鬥潛能

• 踏上為父母復仇的征途，在山地、島嶼藤蔓、沼澤、隱蔽洞穴以及叢林島嶼的各種地形間跳躍和攀爬。

data.short_description: 面對王牌捕獵者— Gaw，為死於其手的父母踏上復仇之旅。征服一波波原始野獸，打敗仇敵的爪牙。隨著在神祕島上穿行，揭開各種秘密，你會遭遇沼澤、瀑布、叢林和充滿骷髏石的洞穴。
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 荷蘭文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 (64bit version only)
  • 處理器: Core i3-3225 3.3 GHz
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GTX 650, AMD Radeon HD 7750, Video Memory: 2 GB VRAM
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: DirectX 11 or DirectX 12 compatible graphics card.
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 (64bit version only)
  • 處理器: Core i5-7300U 3.5 GHz, AMD Ryzen 3 3300U, or equivalent
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GTX 1060, AMD RX 580, or equivalent DX11 GPU, Video Memory: 6 GB VRAM or Higher
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: DirectX 11 or DirectX 12 compatible graphics card.

data.name: Skull Island: Rise of Kong
data.detailed_description:
Embark on a 3rd person action-adventure quest to avenge the death of your parents at the hands of the ultimate alpha predator: Gaw. Conquer waves of primal beasts and defeat the minions of your arch-nemesis on your way to becoming the rightful King of Skull Island. Traverse the mysterious island and uncover lore and all the secrets the island has to offer as you encounter swamps, waterfalls, jungle, and skullite-filled caves that give the island’s flora and fauna its power

• Experience the origins of the orphaned Kong as he metamorphosizes from a young Kong to the fully mature King of Skull Island

• Unleash the combat fury of Kong to deal devastating combos to dominate the ferocious minions of Gaw and tactically unleash rage mode to heighten the impact of your attacks against the island’s gargantuan subterranean denizens

• Send your enemies running for the hills as you unleash Kong’s spine-tingling roar and deliver their final coup de grace through unique finishing attacks

• Discover the Mythos of Skull Island as you unearth collectibles, unlock mysterious areas of the island and learn about the history of the islanders, the exotic flora and fauna and the rich history of the Kongs.

• Ascend Kong to new heights through special events and a variety of boss fights that unlock his full combat potential

• Leap and Climb mountainous terrain, island vines, swamps, hidden caves, and the various terrain of the jungle-island on your quest to avenge the death of your parents.

data.short_description: Embark on a quest to avenge the death of your parents at the hands of the alpha predator: Gaw. Conquer waves of primal beasts and defeat the minions of your arch-nemesis. Traverse the mysterious island and uncover secrets as you encounter swamps, waterfalls, jungle, and skullite-filled caves.
data.supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Dutch
*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10 (64bit version only)
  • Processor: Core i3-3225 3.3 GHz
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Nvidia GTX 650, AMD Radeon HD 7750, Video Memory: 2 GB VRAM
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 4 GB available space
  • Additional Notes: DirectX 11 or DirectX 12 compatible graphics card.

Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10 (64bit version only)
  • Processor: Core i5-7300U 3.5 GHz, AMD Ryzen 3 3300U, or equivalent
  • Memory: 16 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Nvidia GTX 1060, AMD RX 580, or equivalent DX11 GPU, Video Memory: 6 GB VRAM or Higher
  • Storage: 4 GB available space
  • Additional Notes: DirectX 11 or DirectX 12 compatible graphics card.
